title: koanophyllon monanthum
intro: Koanophyllon monanthum, also known as the single-flowered tree dill, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Koanophyllon monanthum include its ability to aid in the treatment of various skin conditions, such as wounds, eczema, and acne, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Koanophyllon monanthum can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and ointments, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
